name: Oreo Delight
recipeIngredient: 15 oz package Oreo or Hydrox cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the cookies in a food processor (or by hand), reserving 1/2 cup for topping.
2. Add the melted butter and press the mixture against the bottom of a 9" x 13-inch baking pan.
3. Blend the cream cheese and confectioners sugar together, adding just enough milk to make the mixture easy to spread.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the cookie crumb crust.
5. Spread half of the whipped topping over the cream cheese mixture.
6. Mix the instant chocolate pudding according to package directions and pour it over the top of the whipped topping.
7. Spread the remaining whipped topping over the pudding.
8. Sprinkle the reserved crushed cookies over the whipped topping.
9. Chill until serving, which serves 14.
